02 — About

I'm a Mechatronics Engineering student focused on mechanical design and CAD development using SOLIDWORKS. My work centers on building high-accuracy models with strong attention to surface control, parametric stability, and structured assemblies. I've developed complex automotive models and mechanical systems, and my work has been featured multiple times by Dassault Systèmes. I'm currently pushing toward professional-level certification (CSWA–CSWE) while continuing to refine my design workflow and engineering thinking.

03 — Portfolio

Selected Work

High-precision SOLIDWORKS models developed through disciplined CAD workflows — from concept layout to full assembly.

01

Formula 1 Concept Car

SOLIDWORKS

A concept Formula One-style vehicle designed in SOLIDWORKS with focus on structural layout and component organization rather than surface modeling. The project emphasized building the model using clear feature logic, standard modeling operations, and efficient assembly structuring. It reflects an approach centered on functional design, mechanical clarity, and clean feature construction.

02

Jet Engine

SOLIDWORKS

A detailed jet engine model developed in SOLIDWORKS, focusing on internal component integration and multi-stage assembly structure. The project involved designing and organizing complex subsystems including turbine stages, compressor sections, and structural housing, with emphasis on alignment, hierarchy, and functional relationships between components.

03

Nissan GT-R

SOLIDWORKS

A detailed automotive modeling project developed to strengthen control over complex geometry and component structuring. The focus was on managing multiple body sections and integrating them into a coherent and well-organized assembly, while preserving dimensional consistency throughout the model.

04

Porsche 911 GT3 RS

SOLIDWORKS

A high-precision automotive model developed in SOLIDWORKS with a strong focus on refinement and visual accuracy. The project was approached by building a stable base structure first, then progressively refining details while maintaining clean geometry and consistent proportions. Particular attention was given to surface continuity, feature organization, and achieving a balanced combination of realism and model stability.

05

Lamborghini Aventador SVJ

SOLIDWORKS

High-detail automotive model of the Lamborghini Aventador SVJ developed in SOLIDWORKS, with focus on complex surface transitions and aggressive design geometry. The workflow emphasized controlled surface modeling, accurate proportions, and maintaining clean feature structure while handling sharp edges and intricate body lines.
